settings.question: How long does it take to get my railing?
settings.answer: Orders within Canada are typically delivered within 2–5 business days. For the United States, delivery may take 1–4 weeks depending on shipping destination and customs clearance.

settings.question: What is the difference between RF product and other mainstream brands?
settings.answer: Our system is one of the easiest to install on the market. We offer three distinct heights with about 40 different widths each. Our glass is 12mm thick, and our hardware is guaranteed against rust for 10 years.

settings.question: How do I install RF Transparent Glass Railing?
settings.answer: Our adjustable spigots allow for easy alignment and customization. Find detailed instructions on our installation page.

settings.question: What are the warranties on the product?
settings.answer: We offer a lifetime warranty on our glass and a 10-year rust warranty on hardware. Damaged items are replaced—no questions asked.
